name: PicPak client
description: Battery-powered PicPak ESP32-C3 e-paper frame running open custom firmware. Wakes on a timer, pulls the current frame over REST (or MQTT), paints the 400×300 4-colour panel via SPI, publishes a battery/RSSI heartbeat, and deep-sleeps. Reads its sleep interval from the server.

sleep_interval_s.label: Sleep interval
sleep_interval_s.help: How long the frame sleeps between fetches when polling via REST. Custom value is in seconds.
